message:
refactor(search,share): align doc_id to i64, rewrite HTTP probe, and harden scrub

- two_tier.rs: change all doc_id fields/signatures from u64 to i64 to
  match SQLite signed row IDs; fix search fallback so
  build_refined_results falls through to full quality search when fast
  results are empty instead of returning empty Vec
- probe.rs: replace curl subprocess shelling with native TLS
  (native_tls behind cfg feature gate), deleting ~160 lines of curl
  machinery; simplify DNS and connect error mapping
- scrub.rs: broaden secret URI pattern from https?:// to
  [a-z][a-z0-9+.-]*:// to catch credentials in any scheme; deep
  recursion (>256) returns Value::Null instead of cloning

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
